title: Better Ghostlands
description: A Remake Of My Terrible Biome Ghostlands From When I First Started Making Mods
body:
This Mod Adds So Many Things All Of Them Can Be Found In The Ghostlands Biome

New Wood:
This Mod Adds a new wood type called Ghost Wood And Ghost Leaves That Can Be Found In The Ghostlands Biome You Can Make All The Normal Wooden Things With Said Wood They Are Just Kinda Green.

New Mob(s):
There Is Only One New Mob Called: Demon Ghost
He Double Wields 2 Netherite Swords And Drops A Netherite Ingot Upon Death(if that is too overpowered I'll release an update without that)
He Is Not A Boss Tho And When He Spawns Fire Will Spawn Under Him He Is Undead And Deals 5 Hearts Per Hit And Is Immune To fire, trident, potion effects, Dragon's Stinky Breath, wither, cactus, explosions, drowning, And anvils when he is struck By Lightning 

New Ores: The New Ghost Ore Is Very Overpowered and you can use it for tools, armor, and the full block the ore spawns ONLY in Ghostlands And You Have To Smelt The Ore To Get The Ingot Which You Use To Make The Armor, Tools, And Full Block

New Biome: The New Biome Called Ghostlands, The Biome I Have Been Talking About For a while The Ghostlands Is Where The Wood, Ores, And Demon Ghost Spawn The Water Is Blood Red And The Water Fog Is Red and you will see The Ghost Wood And Leaves And They Are Grey The Grass Is Gry And Randomly You Will See Crit Particles In The Air

New Potion Effect:
There Is One New Effect Called Death And You Can Probably Tell What It Does
(HINT: it oofs you)

Creative Tab:
The Creative Tab Called Ghost Blocks Has All The Mod's Things In It

New Advancement: The New Advancement Is Called: Land Of The Ghosts 
You Get It When You Enter Ghostlands

New Damage Type: The New Damage Type Called: Ripped Apart
It is a new type Of Damage, That's Pretty Much It


And That Is All That Is In My Mod Have A Nice Day Ya'll!
